title: Claude Design Tutorial: Build a Website in Minutes with AI
summary: Claude Design is an Anthropic feature that enables users to generate website prototypes, landing pages, and presentations from text prompts. The tool supports design system creation, automatic UI and layout generation, and exports functional code for responsive web pages.
